meaning: n.鏀惧純,寮冩潈,鑴辩鍏崇郴
examples: The talks were dependent on a renunciation of terrorism.
Gandhi exemplified the virtues of renunciation, asceticism, and restraint.
It is the American renunciation once more.
And it was driven to sort of openly declare its renunciation of violence in Egypt.
The earnings exclusion cap is also a hypocritical outright renunciation of the rule against double taxation.
